name: python-cryptography-produced dir/A256GCM JWE that meets policy - decrypts
source: pyca/cryptography AESGCM over the compact-JWE construction (no jose involved)
description: A policy-compliant encrypted JWT assembled by hand from RFC 7516's compact construction: protected header as AAD, empty encrypted-key segment (dir), AES-256-GCM ciphertext and tag from pyca/cryptography. Proves Lacewing decrypts JWEs produced with zero shared code. Clock pinned to 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z.
